title: tx_builder doc: DUST_THRESHOLD comparison direction wrong
description: tx_builder.rs:243 — doc comment says 'must be > DUST_THRESHOLD = 10_000' but the actual check is 'if amount_zatoshi < DUST_THRESHOLD' which allows amount == DUST_THRESHOLD (10_000). A payment of exactly 10_000 zatoshi pays 10_000 in fees and delivers nothing net to the recipient, but passes the dust filter. The doc comment should say 'must be >= DUST_THRESHOLD' or the check should be '<=' (which would match the intent of rejecting economically irrational transactions). The inconsistency misleads contributors about the intended behavior.
